WeatherRainMessages: The weather is wearing me down.
This makes every sound harder to trust.
I need to get out of this weather.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WeatherFogMessages: The weather is wearing me down.
This makes every sound harder to trust.
I need to get out of this weather.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WeatherWindMessages: The weather is wearing me down.
This makes every sound harder to trust.
I need to get out of this weather.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WeatherStormMessages: The weather is wearing me down.
This makes every sound harder to trust.
I need to get out of this weather.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
LocationCoastMessages: The coast is where everyone starts, and where too many people die.
I should not stay near the coast for long.
Fresh tracks, empty houses, and bad decisions. That is the coast.
The sea is behind me. Survival is inland.
Someone desperate is always close to the coast.
LocationTownMessages: Every window feels like it is watching me.
Small towns are quiet until they are not.
There might still be something useful here.
I should search quickly and leave.
LocationCityMessages: Too many buildings. Too many angles.
A city can hide supplies, infected, and people with bad intentions.
I do not like how many windows overlook these streets.
The bigger the city, the more chances to die.
LocationForestMessages: The trees might keep me hidden.
The forest is safer, but it gives nothing for free.
I can disappear here if I stay quiet.
Every branch snap sounds louder out here.
The woods feel empty, but I know better.
LocationWildernessMessages: There is nothing out here but distance and bad weather.
If I get hurt out here, nobody will find me.
The wilderness hides me, but it can starve me too.
I need to know where the next water source is.
Out here, mistakes take longer to kill you, but they still kill you.
LocationMilitaryMessages: Military places always smell like trouble.
Someone else will come here looking for weapons.
I should assume I am being watched.
This place is worth looting, but not worth dying for.
LocationPoliceMessages: Police stations are never as empty as they look.
There might be ammunition here, or someone waiting for it.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
LocationMedicalMessages: Hospitals always mean someone desperate came here first.
If anything is left, it will not be much.
I need to move fast. Everyone needs medical supplies.
This place feels like panic frozen in time.
LocationIndustrialMessages: Rust, metal, and hiding places everywhere.
Industrial yards always have too many blind corners.
Tools might be worth the risk.
I should listen before crossing the open ground.
LocationFarmMessages: A farm might mean food, tools, or nothing at all.
The open fields make me feel exposed.
Barns hide more than hay now.
Food used to grow here. Now I have to fight for scraps.
LocationWaterMessages: Someone else may come here to drink.
I should fill everything I can.
A water source is useful, but it is never truly safe.
I need to drink and move before someone finds me.
MapChernarusMessages: This place has its own kind of danger.
I should learn the exits before I relax.
Someone else may pass through here.
Every landmark is a risk and an opportunity.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MapLivoniaMessages: This place has its own kind of danger.
I should learn the exits before I relax.
Someone else may pass through here.
Every landmark is a risk and an opportunity.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MapNamalskMessages: This place has its own kind of danger.
I should learn the exits before I relax.
Someone else may pass through here.

I should remember this if I live long enough.
MapSakhalMessages: This place has its own kind of danger.
I should learn the exits before I relax.

MapGenericMessages: This place has its own kind of danger.
I should learn the exits before I relax.
Someone else may pass through here.
Every landmark is a risk and an opportunity.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShelterSafeMessages: Four walls help, but they do not make me safe.
This place might give me a moment to think.
Shelter is useful. Exits matter more.
I should check every corner before trusting this place.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShelterUnsafeMessages: This building could already belong to someone else.
I need an exit plan before I relax.
Shelter can become a trap fast.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShelterBadWeatherMessages: At least this place can keep some weather off me.
I need to dry out while I can.
Bad weather makes shelter worth the risk.
This cover might save my temperature.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ShelterNightMessages: Night makes every doorway feel dangerous.
If I stay here, I need to secure the exits.
This place is better than standing outside in the dark.
I should listen before I move through the rooms.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
